content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch against `453f57bf5a70cd69f9a3fb0345fadc4bcf80f6fb` and found 2 fix-now correctness issues. Targeted nearby-context unit tests passed via `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub build_nearby_bead_context`; full `nix build` was started but did not complete during the review window.

## Amendments

1. finding_summary: canonical prompt overrides can still bypass the new `Nearby work` section entirely. `src/cli/project.rs:409-415` clears `nearby_bead_context` whenever `prompt_override.is_some()`, and `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:427-431` then validates override prompts with the legacy-compatible shape checker. A task created from an older canonical override is therefore accepted without `## Nearby work`, which drops the adjacent-bead ownership context this bead is supposed to inject. affected_files: `src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs`. remediation_hint: either enrich canonical overrides with builder-generated nearby context before persistence, or reject canonical overrides that omit `## Nearby work`.
   Rationale: This leaves a real execution path where bead-backed tasks do not get the new nearby-context feature, so review/planning stages lose the planned-elsewhere routing information the bead was meant to add.
2. finding_summary: equivalent planned-elsewhere targets are merged as conflicts when reviewers use different allowed aliases for the same nearby bead. `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs:556-567` adds both canonical and short-form nearby IDs to the allowlist, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs:439-441` exposes every allowed form to reviewers, but `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:541-584` compares `mapped_to_bead_id` as raw strings during amendment merge. If one reviewer writes `9ni.6.5` and another writes `6.5`, the merge downgrades the amendment to `fix-now` even though both point at the same bead. affected_files: `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs`. remediation_hint: canonicalize `mapped_to_bead_id` against the prompt allowlist before merging/voting, or stop advertising short aliases in reviewer guidance.
   Rationale: The branch now explicitly encourages nearby-work routing via both ID forms, so this raw-string comparison can incorrectly discard reviewer consensus and force unnecessary restart work.
